description: Circular node containing the decimal number 127, connected by curved black lines to two other circular nodes (186 top-left, 209 top-right) forming a Reuleaux-triangle graph. The decimal values 186=0xBA, 209=0xD1, 127=0x7F correspond to plausible memory-address hex labels.
position: bottom node of the Reuleaux-triangle graph, centered below the two upper nodes labeled 186 and 209
